data.title: JD.com Announces Proposed Offering of CNY-denominated Senior Notes
data.description: Beijing, March 30, 2026 - JD.com, Inc. disclosed plans to issue CNY-denominated senior unsecured notes (the "Notes") in offshore transactions outside the United States to non-U.S. entities under Regulation S of the Securities Act of 1933. The offering, subject to market conditions, will determine the principal amount, interest rates, maturity dates, and additional terms of the Notes upon pricing. JD.com, a prominent supply chain-based technology and service provider, trades on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol JD, while on HKEX, it is listed as 9618 for the HKD counter and 89618 for the RMB counter.

data.title: Senator Blumenthal queries SEC on leniency toward Trump-associated crypto firms. #enforcement #Trump #SEC #Blumenthal
data.description: Senator Richard Blumenthal is requesting the agency to provide clarification on whether it reduced enforcement actions against associates of President Donald Trump.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig Recognized Across Europe and the Middle East by Legal 500 EMEA 2026 Edition
data.description: On March 30, 2026, The Legal 500 Europe, Middle East & Africa (EMEA) 2026 edition acknowledged Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a global law firm, by highlighting 70 practices and 188 lawyers. This recognition is based on the firm's exceptional legal expertise in the region. The EMEA guide extensively covers over 80 countries, showcasing the top legal practices and professionals in the industry.

data.title: Cole DaSilva's Book, Best Day of My Life Is Live: A Transformative Journey for Personal Growth
data.description: In Kelowna, BC on March 30, 2026, Best Day of My Life, an innovative book by successful author and entrepreneur Cole Luis DaSilva has been released for public consumption. This book serves as a valuable resource for individuals seeking to enhance their self-improvement journey and accomplish their goals. Best Day of My Life offers practical strategies and advice to aid readers in reaching their full potential.

data.title: Food company, Innovative Food Holdings, Inc., releases financial results for Q4 and FY 2025.
data.description: The latest statistics indicate a significant increase in COVID-19 cases, with over 50,000 new infections reported in the past 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of active cases in the country to more than 300,000, putting a strain on the healthcare system. The death toll has also risen, reaching over 1,000 fatalities. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, efforts are being made to ramp up testing and hospital capacity to better handle the growing number of cases.

data.title: Natura announces reconfiguration of its Board of Directors and governance changes to drive a new cycle
data.description: The founders of Natura have recently signed a fresh Shareholders' Agreement, showcasing their dedication to the company's future. As part of this agreement, they have decided to shift from the Board of Directors to a newly formed Advisory Board with the aim of safeguarding the core values of the company. In tandem with this transition, Fábio Barbosa will resign as the Chairman following the completion of the reorganization process.

data.title: Fox News employee's lawsuit dismissed by federal judge. Reporter failed to prove retaliation or discrimination claims.
data.description: A federal judge dismissed the case of a reporter who alleged he was dismissed by the network for questioning its content, stating there was no evidence of retaliation or discrimination.

data.title: SUPER BOWL RETURNS TO LAS VEGAS IN 2029
data.description: Assets for the upcoming Super Bowl LXIII in 2029 will be updated regularly and can be accessed through the provided link. The National Football League has revealed that Las Vegas is set to host the event at Allegiant Stadium. This announcement was made during the NFL Annual Meeting in Phoenix on March 30, 2026. Super Bowl LXIII is scheduled to take place in 2029, marking a significant moment for the city of Las Vegas and football fans around the world.

data.title: STASH DISPENSARIES BRINGS ROSINMANIA 26 TO ORLAND HILLS WITH MICRO WRESTLING WARRIORS -- A HIGH-ENERGY LIVE EXPERIENCE
data.description: A major event called ROSINMANIA 26, organized by Stash Dispensaries, is set to take place in Orland Hills on April 4th, 2026 from 5:00 PM to 10:00 PM. The event will feature Micro Wrestling Warriors and will be held at Stash Dispensaries in Orland Hills.
